todos.content: GLD_AUG_CL_EMIT — Generate executable CL model for atciic100_real
todos.activeForm: Verifying executable CL exists for atciic100_real
todos.detail: Cycle-level model wraps FunctionalModel; provides .drive(), .tick(), .observe(), .coverage(). CL must NEVER re-evaluate output_rules/state_updates.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/model/cycle_model.py exists
File contains zero occurrences of output_rules / state_updates / _eval_rule_expr
CycleModel API smoke test passes

todos.content: GLD_AUG_PPA_SWEEP — Drive PPA sweep through CL.tick and report measured area/power/fmax
todos.detail: Use CycleModel to produce activity vectors fed into syn / sta-post / pnr workers; capture measured PPA.
todos.criteria:
<ip>/reports/ppa_sweep.json exists with measured_area_um2, measured_power_mw, measured_fmax_mhz
Measured values within budgets defined by SSOT, or escalation noted

todos.content: GLD_AUG_SECURITY_GOALS — Add EQ_SECURITY_* goals for atciic100_real
todos.detail: Each declared asset/threat should produce a security equivalence goal with stimulus + observable.
todos.criteria:
equivalence_goals.json contains at least one EQ_SECURITY_* goal
Each asset/threat from SSOT is referenced
todos.validator: python3 -c "import json; g=json.load(open('atciic100_real/verify/equivalence_goals.json')); raise SystemExit(0 if any(x['goal_id'].startswith('EQ_SECURITY_') for x in g['goals']) else 1)"
